title: InterfaceArchetype
description: Schema for Interface Ascriptions — declarative exposure manifest of a Structure's boundary. Defines the owning Structure and the Effector/Receptor ports exposed for inter-Structure coupling. Interface has no behavior — all behavior lives in Mechanisms. DM input = DM output (1:1). Tenant-defined archetypes extending Interface MUST reference this schema via allOf.

structure.description: ID reference to the owning Structure. All exposed Effectors and Receptors MUST belong to Mechanisms of this Structure.

effectors.description: List of ID references to Effectors exposed by this Interface. All referenced Effectors MUST belong to Mechanisms of the owning Structure. A given Effector SHOULD be exposed by at most one Interface within a Structure.

receptors.description: List of ID references to Receptors exposed by this Interface. All referenced Receptors MUST belong to Mechanisms of the owning Structure. A given Receptor SHOULD be exposed by at most one Interface within a Structure.
